description: RPG任务隐喻。16-bit调色板，横版世界地图，像素角色。
base_style_prompt: Pixel art RPG style. 16-bit color palette: sky blue (#87CEEB), grass green (#4CAF50), UI deep blue (#1A237E), gold (#FFD700). Side-scrolling RPG world map. Pixel-art characters across four regions. RPG progress bar. Text boxes with dialogue. QUEST narrative metaphor. Retro gaming aesthetic.
